title: Can lip filler trigger a herpes simplex infection？
filename: Can lip filler trigger a herpes simplex infection？.en.vtt
excerpt: So can lip enhancement trigger a herpes simplex infection [Music] so i've got to be careful here because there is no way that a sterile procedure can infect you with herpes but if you already have a herpes infection which 70 of the population actually have already been exposed to…

segments.text: so can lip enhancement trigger a herpes simplex infection [Music] so i've got to be careful here because there is no way that a sterile procedure can infect you with herpes but if you already have a herpes infection which 70 of the population actually have already been exposed to that virus and have antibodies against it then you may get a recurrence of that infection and it's something to do with trauma on the lip and if you're putting a needle through the vermilion border and there's trauma involved same as what you might get from sunlight or from wind when there's localized inflammation seems to trigger the hsv virus to wake up and to replicate its life cycle again and you get a an ulcer that forms so um with those little vesicles on it so yes it is possible that you may have a cold sore after a lip filler treatment but it's not from catching it from the procedure it's simply triggering a virus that was already
there to go over his life cycle one more time and replicate

transcript: so can lip enhancement trigger a herpes simplex infection [Music] so i've got to be careful here because there is no way that a sterile procedure can infect you with herpes but if you already have a herpes infection which 70 of the population actually have already been exposed to that virus and have antibodies against it then you may get a recurrence of that infection and it's something to do with trauma on the lip and if you're putting a needle through the vermilion border and there's trauma involved same as what you might get from sunlight or from wind when there's localized inflammation seems to trigger the hsv virus to wake up and to replicate its life cycle again and you get a an ulcer that forms so um with those little vesicles on it so yes it is possible that you may have a cold sore after a lip filler treatment but it's not from catching it from the procedure it's simply triggering a virus that was already there to go over his life cycle one more time and replicate
